name: The Path to Memento Mori
short_description: In The Path to Memento Mori, players navigate eerie mazes in a co-op multiplayer horror puzzle game, solving complex puzzles and evading relentless monsters. Work together to uncover buried family secrets and unravel the chilling mystery that lies at the heart of the estate.
detailed_description:
The Path to Memento Mori plunges you into the depths of the haunted Sullivan estate, where something dark and forgotten stirs beneath the surface. After the death of his grandfather, Daniel returns to his childhood home only to be drawn into a web of hidden catacombs, twisted mazes, and a sinister mystery left behind by his late custodian. Daniel must confront a past he’s repressed, solving puzzles and navigating through nightmarish challenges to uncover a secret buried deep within the estate.

In this 1-4 player cooperative horror puzzle game, you'll need to work together to survive the relentless monsters lurking in the catacombs while deciphering intricate puzzles designed to keep the estate’s secrets locked away. As you explore the dark, atmospheric environments, a haunting soundtrack heightens the tension, immersing you in a chilling experience that grows more intense with every step.

Key Features:

  • Co-op Multiplayer: Team up with up to four players to tackle the estate's mysteries, with teamwork being your key to survival.

  • Puzzles and Mazes: Test your wits and unravel the twisted puzzles that stand between you and the truth.

  • Horror Atmosphere: Explore eerie environments drenched in a haunting, immersive atmosphere that will send shivers down your spine.

  • Relentless Enemies: Evade and outsmart the relentless monsters that stalk the catacombs, ready to trap you in the shadows of the past.

  • Progressive Difficulty: As you delve deeper into the estate’s secrets, the mazes and puzzles become increasingly complex and dangerous.

Will you and your team uncover the truth behind Daniel’s past, or will you succumb to the darkness that lurks within the Sullivan estate?
